description: Agent-native SE Ranking CLI for SEO data, backlinks, keyword research, domain analysis, AI Search visibility, project rank data, and site-audit workflows.

novel_features.name: AI Search visibility discovery
novel_features.description: Discover brand visibility and answer-engine coverage for a target URL using SE Ranking AI Search data.

novel_features.name: Keyword opportunity pack
novel_features.description: Build keyword expansion workflows from similar, question, related, and long-tail keyword research endpoints.

novel_features.name: Competitor gap radar
novel_features.description: Compare a domain against competitors to identify keyword overlap and organic search gaps.

novel_features.name: Backlink decay sentinel
novel_features.description: Track new and lost backlinks or referring domains for outreach and SEO-health monitoring.

novel_features.name: Site-audit issue triage
novel_features.description: Inspect audited pages by issue so agents can group technical SEO problems into actionable tickets.
